title: guajava lactea
intro: Guajava lactea, also known as the white guava, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family that is native to Central America and Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Guajava lactea include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. Guajava lactea can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, flu, and gastrointestinal disorders.
